name: self-improvement-log
description: After a failed or suboptimal attempt, document what went wrong and generate a steering rule or skill to prevent the same mistake in the future.

attempted_approach.description: What was tried and why it failed

correct_approach.description: What should have been done instead (if known)

steps.template:
Step 2 — Generate prevention rule:

Steering rule format:
- Trigger: [when this situation is detected]
- Rule: [what to do differently]
- Rationale: [why this prevents the problem]
- Example: [concrete before/after]

Should this become:
- A steering file rule (always/conditionally applied)?
- A new skill (reusable workflow)?
- A pre-tool-use hook (automated check)?
- A memory entry (context for future)?

Step 3 — Create the artifact:
- Write the rule/skill/hook in its proper format
- Include the incident as a cautionary example
- Tag with category: {{category}}
- Set priority: How often might this recur?

Meta-learning:
- Pattern: Is this an instance of a broader failure mode?
- Related rules: Does this complement or conflict with existing rules?
- Expiration: Will this rule become obsolete? When to review?
